workflow_rationale: Adding three new CLI commands to an existing system with process management and state transitions

phases.name: Add Meta Fields
phases.description: Add exit_code and paused_at fields to Meta struct

subtasks.description: Add exit_code and paused_at fields to Meta struct in bop-core
subtasks.notes: Added Option<i32> exit_code and Option<DateTime<Utc>> paused_at fields to Meta struct, following the pattern of retry_count/failure_reason. Updated Default impl. Build verified successful.

phases.name: Write Exit Code on Failure
phases.description: Update dispatcher to write exit_code and failure_reason when cards fail

subtasks.description: Write exit_code to meta.json when card moves to failed/

verification.instructions: Read dispatcher.rs to confirm exit_code is written before fs::rename to failed/

subtasks.notes: Added exit_code writes in two locations: (1) workspace prepare failure sets exit_code=None at line 268, (2) process completion sets exit_code=Some(exit_code) at line 389. Both write meta before fs::rename to failed/. Also fixed Meta struct initializations in cards.rs to include new exit_code and paused_at fields.

subtasks.description: Write failure_reason as last line of stderr when moving to failed/

verification.instructions: Read dispatcher.rs to confirm failure_reason is read from stderr and written to meta

subtasks.notes: Added util::read_last_nonempty_line() helper function in util.rs to read last non-empty line from stderr with 256 byte truncation. Updated dispatcher.rs in two locations: (1) workspace prepare failure (line 269) - reads stderr or falls back to error message, (2) process completion failure (lines 394-401) - reads stderr only when will_fail is true. Both locations write meta.failure_reason before fs::rename to failed/. Build and clippy verified successful.

phases.name: Implement bop pause
phases.description: Add pause command to stop running adapters and return cards to pending/

subtasks.description: Add Pause command variant to main.rs Command enum
subtasks.notes: Added Pause command variant at line 110-113 with id: String parameter following the pattern of Retry/Kill commands. Added stub match arm in main() at line 578-582 with placeholder implementation (will be replaced in subtask-3-2). Also added stub cmd_pause function in cards.rs. Build verified successful with cargo build --package bop.

Implemented cmd_pause as async function that: (1) scans both flat and team-based running/ directories for .bop/.jobcard cards, (2) for each card calls pause_single_card helper which reads PID via reaper::read_pid, sends SIGTERM, waits up to 5s polling with is_alive (100ms intervals), sends SIGKILL if still alive with 200ms grace period, (3) checks card still exists before meta update (race condition check - handles concurrent dispatcher exit-75 moves), (4) updates meta with paused_at timestamp and resets Running stages to Pending, (5) creates pending_dir if needed with fs::create_dir_all, (6) renames using actual filename (not hardcoded .bop) to team-appropriate pending/ directory (preserves team structure via card_parent logic), (7) renders thumbnail. Main.rs already has .await on cmd_pause call. Build verified successful with cargo build.

subtasks.description: Wire Pause command in main.rs match block
subtasks.notes: Pause command already wired at line 578: Command::Pause { id } => cards::cmd_pause(&root, &id).await. Verified with successful cargo build --package bop. No changes needed.

phases.name: Implement bop resume
phases.description: Add resume command to clear paused_at markers from pending cards

subtasks.description: Add Resume command variant to main.rs Command enum
subtasks.notes: Added Resume command variant at line 114-117 with id: String parameter following the pattern of Pause/Kill commands. Added match arm in main() at line 583 calling cards::cmd_resume(&root, &id).await. Created stub cmd_resume function in cards.rs (returns unimplemented error) to enable build to succeed. Build verified successful with cargo build --package bop.

Implemented cmd_resume that: (1) scans both flat and team-based pending/ directories for .bop/.jobcard cards, (2) reads meta.json for each card, (3) filters for cards with paused_at set, (4) clears paused_at field and writes meta back, (5) re-renders thumbnail, (6) prints '▶  queued for dispatch: <id>' for each resumed card. Handles cases where no pending cards exist or no paused cards found. Build verified successful with cargo build --package bop.

subtasks.description: Wire Resume command in main.rs match block
subtasks.notes: Resume command already wired at line 583: Command::Resume { id } => cards::cmd_resume(&root, &id).await. This was completed in subtask-4-1. Verified with successful cargo build --package bop. No changes needed.

phases.name: Implement bop retry-transient
phases.description: Add retry-transient command to retry only transient failures

subtasks.notes: Added TRANSIENT_PATTERNS const with 11 patterns (rate limit, 429, 503, timeout, connection refused, network, ECONNRESET, EX_TEMPFAIL, name resolution failed, no route to host, 524). Placed after imports with doc comment explaining usage by bop retry-transient. Build verified successful with cargo build --package bop.

subtasks.description: Add RetryTransient command variant with --all flag
subtasks.notes: Added RetryTransient command variant at line 110-117 with id: Option<String> and #[arg(long)] all: bool parameters following the pattern of other commands. Added match arm in main() at line 591-593 calling cards::cmd_retry_transient(&root, id.as_deref(), all). Created stub cmd_retry_transient function in cards.rs that returns unimplemented errors for now (will be implemented in subtask-5-3). Build verified successful with cargo build --package bop.

Implemented cmd_retry_transient that: (1) added is_transient_failure helper function that checks exit_code==75, meta.failure_reason, and last line of logs/stderr against TRANSIENT_PATTERNS using case-insensitive matching, (2) handles both single card ID and scan-all-failed modes, (3) for single card mode: validates card is in failed state, updates meta (increment retry_count, clear failure_reason/exit_code), resets Failed stages to Pending, renames to appropriate pending directory preserving team structure, (4) for scan mode: scans both flat and team-based failed/ directories, filters by transient check (or --all flag bypasses), updates meta same as single mode, prints skip messages for non-transient failures with reason, (5) logs lineage events and re-renders thumbnails for all retried cards. Build verified successful with cargo build --package bop.

RetryTransient command already fully wired at lines 590-592: Command::RetryTransient { id, all } => cards::cmd_retry_transient(&root, id.as_deref(), all). This was completed in subtask-5-2. Verified with successful cargo build --package bop. No changes needed.

phases.name: Testing and Documentation
phases.description: Run make check and create sample output documentation

subtasks.description: Run make check to verify all tests pass

verification.expected: All tests, clippy, and fmt checks pass

subtasks.notes: All tests, clippy, and fmt checks pass. Fixed test code Meta initializers to include exit_code and paused_at fields. Fixed clippy warning by using rfind instead of filter().next_back(). Applied cargo fmt to fix formatting.

subtasks.description: Create output/result.md with sample command outputs

verification.instructions: Verify output/result.md exists and contains sample outputs for all three commands

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive output/result.md with sample outputs for all three commands: (1) bop pause - shows pausing multiple cards, nothing running case, and race condition handling, (2) bop resume - shows resuming paused cards and no paused cards case, (3) bop retry-transient - shows single card retry, scanning with transient filtering, --all flag bypassing filter, and no failed cards case. Also documented transient failure patterns and meta field updates (paused_at, exit_code, failure_reason).

parallel_groups.reason: All depend only on phase-1, modify different code sections

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution recommended - phases modify overlapping files

acceptance_criteria: bop pause stops running adapters and moves cards to pending/ with paused_at timestamp
bop pause does NOT double-move cards that exit voluntarily with code 75
bop pause handles race conditions with concurrent dispatcher
bop resume clears paused_at markers from pending cards
bop retry-transient --all retries all failed cards regardless of reason
exit_code field written to meta.json on failure
failure_reason populated from stderr last line on failure
verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk change adding new CLI commands with process management - requires unit tests and linting to ensure correctness
